reviews.review_msg: Arbitrary standards and shows little care about student's success. Grading scheme and course structures are changed all the time. He often refers to students by their student number or race + gender which is very weird and degrading. Very ineffective teaching - never ever does formative assessments and just yaps for 4 hours non-stop.

Include attendance in additional courses beyond the syllabus as part of the overall grade
usless and old youtube veido
Not organize. Instruction is unclear. Quizzes are too difficulties. Tutorial videos are too old and not helpful.

I actually think Scott's course is not that bad, considering most students found it very hard. He's passionate and funny. However, it is statistics, and almost every stats courses I took are boring and test heavy, but I found his stats 203 is actually one of least boring stats course. (Considering I studied at both SFU and UBC)

Tough course, but using unstuckstudy ai and the textbook helped me get through it. The professor can be unclear, but engaging in class and going to office hours makes a difference. Overall, a challenging but manageable class.

DONT TAKE THIS PROF!! Handwrites notes & (sometimes) uploads them, doesnt post or teach from any slides. Exams and hw are not based on what is taught in class, which is hard to follow. Makes sexist comments and criticizes us for not "doing work." Be prepared to self-learn the entire course- content is not actually difficult. Good human, bad teacher

Honestly, it was actually a pretty easy course, I got an A but I didn't listen to the class at all because I watched all the videos carefully. There was nothing on the final exam that the professor didn't cover, except that the professor was harsh and his questions were very challenging and very much tested your basics and your IQ.

Easily one of the worst profs at sfu. I shed literal tears during exams. No matter how much you study, get ready for this course to drag your gpa down to the trenches. The lectures, practice problems, and exams are all completely different. nothing aligns. He was terrible at explaining and misogynistic and is never available outside of class.

Went into this class thinking I was gonna fail and came out with the A- 

Just listen to what he says
Horrible professor, avoid taking class with him if you want to succeed.
